title: Genesys Cloud average MOS is degraded
description: Alerts when the average conversation MOS (Mean Opinion Score) reported by Genesys Cloud drops below an acceptable call-quality threshold, indicating degraded voice quality.

definition.message: The average Genesys Cloud conversation MOS has dropped below {{threshold}} for {{region.name}}, indicating degraded call quality.
definition.name: [Genesys Cloud MOS] Average MOS is degraded on {{region.name}}
